name: bun-browser
description: Bun Core compiled to WebAssembly for browsers, driven by a host JS engine via the JSI bridge.

scripts.build:wasm: cd ../.. && zig build --build-file build-wasm-smoke.zig build-wasm && cp zig-out/packages/bun-browser/bun-core.wasm packages/bun-browser/bun-core.wasm
scripts.build:wasm:release: cd ../.. && zig build --build-file build-wasm-smoke.zig build-wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseFast && cp zig-out/packages/bun-browser/bun-core.wasm packages/bun-browser/bun-core.wasm
